overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a historical action game showing an assassin character exploring a stone building colonnade and upper balconies in a European city setting. The character walks past medical triage areas with injured NPCs, transitions through dimly lit interiors, and emerges onto an upper level overlooking a courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone colonnade with medical triage area

events.description: character enters covered walkway from cobblestone courtyard
character stops and turns to observe the medical treatment scene

agents.ego_description: walking into the colonnade past dead bodies and stopping to observe a doctor treating wounded patients

notable_agents.action: doctor in blue coat treating patient on medical cot
injured person lying on stone floor with visible blood

tall classical stone columns supporting the colonnade roof
large evergreen shrubs in wooden planters flanking the entrance
short stone staircase leading into the building
wooden cot with white sheets where a patient lies
stacked wooden barrels along the wall
multiple bodies lying on the ground suggesting recent violence
tall wooden shelving unit with bottles and supplies

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered stone colonnade from an outdoor courtyard, passing potted trees and stone steps. Dead bodies lie on the tiled floor, and a doctor treats a patient on a medical cot to the right. The character stops to observe the scene before wooden shelves and barrels visible along the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor colonnade with red carpet runner

events.description: character resumes walking down the colonnade after observing
approaching darker interior entrance at end of colonnade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the colonnade past seated injured NPCs and standing figures

notable_agents.action: injured person sitting against wall near wooden bench
NPC in period clothing walking toward the camera

entered.detail: long red carpet running down the center of the walkway
series of stone arches opening to the exterior courtyard
iron brazier basket containing burning coals for light
simple wooden bench against the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the ground floor colonnade, passing stone columns and a red carpet runner. Injured NPCs sit on wooden benches while others walk through the space. Stone archways reveal the exterior courtyard, and fire braziers provide additional lighting as the character approaches a darker interior entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior stone corridor and staircase with fire braziers

events.description: entering darker interior space lit by fire braziers
ascending the stone staircase to upper level

agents.ego_description: entering the darker interior and climbing the stone stairs to the upper floor

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading upward to the next floor
wooden railing along the upper landing
wall-mounted iron basket with burning fire providing warm light
simple wooden table against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker interior corridor illuminated by fire braziers mounted on the stone walls. The space is empty of people. The character approaches and climbs a wide stone staircase with wooden railings, passing a wooden table, transitioning from the ground floor to the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor balcony overlooking courtyard with classical architecture

events.description: emerging from dark interior onto sunlit upper balcony
navigating through groups of NPCs on the balcony

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper balcony past well-dressed NPCs while overlooking the courtyard

notable_agents.action: elegantly dressed woman in wide-brimmed white hat and green dress
group of nobles in period clothing conversing on the balcony

entered.detail: ornate stone balustrade overlooking the lower courtyard
view of classical stone buildings and courtyard through the arches
decorative stone urns placed along the balcony edge
decorative fabric banner hanging on the interior wall

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark interior onto a bright upper balcony with stone railings overlooking a courtyard. Well-dressed NPCs in period clothing walk along the red carpet, including a woman in a distinctive white hat. Stone vases and hanging tapestries decorate the space, with views of classical architecture visible through the arches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grim, medical triage area in a stone colonnade up to a bright, opulent upper balcony. It begins as the character enters a covered walkway filled with potted trees and dead bodies, passing a doctor treating a patient on a medical cot. As the character moves forward along a red carpet runner, the scene shifts from the triage area to a bustling corridor of injured NPCs and flickering fire braziers before turning into a dark, empty interior. The camera then follows the character up a wide stone staircase, transitioning from the dimness of the ground floor toward a sudden burst of light. Finally, the scene opens onto a sunlit upper balcony where well-dressed NPCs stroll past stone vases and hanging tapestries overlooking a classical courtyard.
